api_endpoint.description: The endpoint URL of the API Gateway.

api_key_selection_expression.description: The expression to select the API key for requests.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the API Gateway.

cors_configuration.description: The Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) configuration for the API.

description.description: A brief description of the API Gateway.

disable_execute_api_endpoint.description: Indicates whether the execute API endpoint is disabled.

execution_arn.description: The ARN used for executing the API.

id.description: The unique identifier for the API Gateway.

name.description: The name of the API Gateway.

protocol_type.description: The protocol type of the API Gateway, such as HTTP or WEBSOCKET.

route_selection_expression.description: The expression used to select routes for the API.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the API Gateway.

version.description: The version of the API Gateway.
